platform company developing bispecific antibodies, multispecific antibodies, ADCs, antibody fragments, BiTEs. Verdict: yes (confidence: high). platform company developing ADCs, multispecific antibodies, bispecific antibodies. Verdict: yes (confidence: high). CDMO service provider developing ADCs. Verdict: yes (confidence: high). Piramal Pharma Solutions is a global CDMO with over 20 years of specialized experience in antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) development and manufacturing, operating dedicated GMP bioconjugate facilities in Grangemouth, UK and Lexington, KY, USA. The company offers fully integrated ADC services—from payload-linker development and conjugation through to clinical and commercial fill/finish—under its branded ADCelerate programme, and recently completed its 1,500th ADC batch. All ngAbs activity is purely service/CDMO-oriented (manufacturing for clients), with no evidence of Piramal developing proprietary therapeutic ADC pipeline assets of its own.
